html:
2026-0286
2026-03-30INFCFinancial Administration ActCanada Lands Company Limited ** leases for 2026-27 **Order (1) authorizing the Old Port of Montréal Corporation Inc. to enter into up to 30 leases in 2026-27, retain and use any associated proceeds if the leases are consistent with the last corporate plan of Canada Lands Company Limited, in respect of that period; and (2) authorizing Parc Downsview Park Inc. to enter into up to 39 leases in 2026-2027, and to retain and use any associated proceeds if the leases are consistent with the last corporate plan of Canada Lands Company Limited, in respect of that period.N/A
subject: Canada Lands Company Limited ** leases for 2026-27 **
precis: Order (1) authorizing the Old Port of Montréal Corporation Inc. to enter into up to 30 leases in 2026-27, retain and use any associated proceeds if the leases are consistent with the last corporate plan of Canada Lands Company Limited, in respect of that period; and (2) authorizing Parc Downsview Park Inc. to enter into up to 39 leases in 2026-2027, and to retain and use any associated proceeds if the leases are consistent with the last corporate plan of Canada Lands Company Limited, in respect of that period.
